task.name: Shard Document
task.objective: Split a large markdown document into smaller files based on level-2 (H2) sections

critical.mandate: Default split level is H2 (##) — user can override to H1 or H3
Preserve ALL content — never drop text between sections
Generate an index.md linking to all shards
Ask user for confirmation before writing files

step.title: Load Source
step.action: Ask user for the source file path

step.title: Parse Sections
step.action: Identify all sections at the split level (default: H2)
Any content before the first section becomes _preamble.md
Generate a filename for each section from its heading: - Lowercase, hyphenate spaces, remove special characters - Prefix with section number: 01-section-name.md

step.title: Preview Plan
step.action: Show user the planned file list with line counts
If user adjusts: update plan accordingly

step.title: Write Shards
step.action: Create output directory (same name as source file, without extension)
Write each section to its file
Write index.md linking all shards with descriptions

step.title: Report
step.action: Report: number of shards created, total lines distributed
Suggest running index-docs task to update parent folder index
